_comment: Top-level Codex hook configuration shipped to ~/.codex/hooks.json by the runner image (agent-events-and-approvals spec: hooks MUST live in the user-level ~/.codex/hooks.json, NOT a repo-local .codex/config.toml, which does not fire). The hook scripts themselves are authored by the agent-events track at apps/runner/src/hooks/ and compiled to apps/runner/dist/hooks/*.js; this file only wires Codex's PreToolUse/PostToolUse hook events to those compiled entry points and is intentionally not editing them.
